Query.SQL: SELECT C.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", C.FAX_NO AS "C.FAX_NO", C.NAME AS "C.NAME", C.TEL_NO AS "C.TEL_NO", CA.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "CA.ADMIN_CRT_CODE", CA.CASE_NUMBER AS "CA.CASE_NUMBER", CA.CASE_TYPE AS "CA.CASE_TYPE", CA.COURT_FEE AS "CA.COURT_FEE", CA.SOLICITORS_COSTS AS "CA.SOLICITORS_COSTS", CA.DATE_OF_ISSUE AS "CA.DATE_OF_ISSUE", CA.STATUS AS "CA.STATUS", (SELECT CRC.RV_IIT_CODE_1 FROM CCBC_REF_CODES CRC WHERE CRC.RV_LOW_VALUE = CA.CASE_TYPE AND CRC.RV_DOMAIN IN ('CURRENT_CASE_TYPE','CASE_TYPE_OBSOLETE_BY_IIT')) AS "CA.JURISDICTION", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM OBLIGATIONS OB WHERE OB.CASE_NUMBER = CA.CASE_NUMBER AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N') AS "OB.OBLIGATION_SEQ", (SELECT DECODE( COUNT(*), 0 , 'false', 'true') FROM WARRANTS W WHERE W.CASE_NUMBER = CA.CASE_NUMBER AND W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY = CA.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND ((W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 1 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' ) ) OR ( W.DEFENDANT2 IS NOT NULL AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, RETURN_CODES RC WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = W.WARRANT_ID AND WR.DEFENDANT_ID = 2 AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NOT NULL AND WR.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' )))) AS "W.IS_OUTSTANDING", GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID", GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1", GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2", GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3", GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4", GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5", GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE", CA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CA_ORA_ROWSCN", C.ORA_ROWSCN AS "C_ORA_ROWSCN", GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASES CA, COURTS C, GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CA.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND C.CODE = CA.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND GA.COURT_CODE = CA.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'OFFICE' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL

Query.Join: CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${CA.CASE_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID

LinkedJoin.Join: J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR2.PARTY_ID AND C.CODE = J.JUDGMENT_COURT_CODE AND CCBC.RV_LOW_VALUE = J.INSTALMENT_PERIOD AND CCBC.RV_DOMAIN = 'INSTALMENT_PERIOD'

J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND J.JUDG_SEQ = IP.JUDG_SEQ AND IP.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = IP.CASE_NUMBER AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = IP.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = IP.CASE_PARTY_NO
J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND CE.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = '160'

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT J.JUDG_SEQ AS "J.JUDG_SEQ", V.APPLICATION_DATE AS "V.APPLICATION_DATE", V.DETERMINATION_AMOUNT AS "V.DETERMINATION_AMOUNT", V.DETERMINATION_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "DETERMINATION_AMOUNT_CURRENCY", V.DETERMINATION_PERIOD AS "V.DETERMINATION_PERIOD", V.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE AS "V.FIRST_PAYMENT_DATE", V.HEARING_REQD AS "V.HEARING_REQD", V.JUDG_SEQ AS "V.JUDG_SEQ", V.OBJECTION_DATE AS "V.OBJECTION_DATE", V.OBJECTOR AS "V.OBJECTOR", V.OFFER_AMOUNT AS "V.OFFER_AMOUNT", V.OFFER_AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "V.OFFER_AMOUNT_CURRENCY", V.OFFER_PERIOD AS "V.OFFER_PERIOD", V.PLAINTIFF_RESPONSE AS "V.PLAINTIFF_RESPONSE", V.REQUESTER AS "V.REQUESTER", V.RESPONSE_DATE AS "V.RESPONSE_DATE", V.RESULT AS "V.RESULT", V.RESULT_DATE AS "V.RESULT_DATE", V.VARY_SEQ AS "V.VARY_SEQ", (SELECT CCBC.RV_MEANING FROM CCBC_REF_CODES CCBC WHERE CCBC.RV_LOW_VALUE = V.DETERMINATION_PERIOD AND CCBC.RV_DOMAIN = 'DETERMINATION_PERIOD') AS "CCBC.RV_MEANING1", (SELECT CCBC.RV_MEANING FROM CCBC_REF_CODES CCBC WHERE CCBC.RV_LOW_VALUE = V.OFFER_PERIOD AND CCBC.RV_DOMAIN = 'INSTALMENT_PERIOD') AS "CCBC.RV_MEANING2", V.ORA_ROWSCN AS "V_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM VARIATIONS V, JUDGMENTS J WHERE J.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.CaseNumber} AND V.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ
